package rulecoverage

func NegativeRepositoryMethodReturnsPartiallyBuiltScopesForCallerChaining() string {
    ruleID := "repository_method_returns_partially_built_scopes_for_caller_chaining"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Repositories that expose scope-building fragments instead of complete query APIs."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
